---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in NewsLens
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happens. Include error messages or screenshots.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., Windows 11 ARM, macOS, Linux)
- **Browser/Device:** (e.g., Chrome 120, Android 14 physical device)
- **Node.js version:**
- **Running via:** (web dev server / Docker / Capacitor APK)
